message:
feat: add rank-3 tensor tests and fix pad expected dimensions

api_transform_suite.rs:
- Add api_vmap_add_one_rank3_strict: vmap over a [2,2,3] i64 tensor
- Add stacking_vmap_vmap_vmap_grad_rank3: triple-nested vmap(grad) on
  a [2,2,2] f64 tensor verifies gradient == 2x for square
- Add error_grad_rank3_input: confirm grad rejects rank-3 input with
  GradRequiresScalar error

fj-dispatch/src/lib.rs:
- Add dispatch_triple_vmap_grad_square_rank3_tensor: end-to-end
  dispatch test for vmap(vmap(vmap(grad(square)))) on rank-3 input
- Add dispatch_grad_square_rank3_tensor_rejects_non_scalar_input:
  dispatch-level error path for grad on non-scalar rank-3 tensor

fj-lax/src/lib.rs:
- Fix pad test expected shape from [3,5] to [3,4] and remove three
  extraneous zero literals that reflected the wrong output width; the
  padding params "1,0"/"0,1"/"0,1" on a [2,2] input produce [3,4],
  not [3,5]
- Reformat import line (rustfmt)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
